nasb.text: At that time the servants of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon went up to Jerusalem, and the city came under siege.

esv.text: At that time the servants of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came up to Jerusalem, and the city was besieged.

cnv.text: 那時，巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒的臣僕來到耶路撒冷，城就被圍困。

ccb.text: 那时，巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒派将领围攻耶路撒冷。
